/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/AI_Pathfinding_Project.dir/src/algorithms/BFS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AI_Pathfinding_Project.dir/src/algorithms/DFS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AI_Pathfinding_Project.dir/src/core/Graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AI_Pathfinding_Project.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o AI_Pathfinding_Project  /usr/lib64/libsfml-graphics.so.2.5.1 /usr/lib64/libsfml-window.so.2.5.1 /usr/lib64/libsfml-system.so.2.5.1
